name: WINTRUST FINANCIAL CORP
summary: PART I Overview Wintrust Financial Corporation, an Illinois corporation (we, Wintrust or the Company), which was incorporated in 1992, is a financial holding company based in Rosemont, Illinois, with total assets of approximately $71.1 billion as of December31, 2025.
